records.m_Talk_FRA: Apr958s un long moment de r959flexion et de nombreuses d959lib959rations,

records.m_Talk_ENG: that this employee, whom you'd been giving a lot of thought to, was absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with him, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: ihn an dich zu binden, egal was auch passiert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called him to your office. He said he'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_VTN: Sau khi quy8691t 96e879nh, ng95pi 96e95s g87ai anh ta 96e8691n v96Yn ph958ng. Anh ta cho bi8691t m95znh s8689 s87mm c959 m8683t t86qi 96e95ry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du ihn in dein B9588ro gerufen. Er sagte, er wolle bald da sein.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959 dans votre bureau. Il ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract, is it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract, is it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract, is it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You still have strange tastes, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You still have strange tastes, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You still have strange tastes, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you offer such things to the others in this company as well?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you offer such things to the others in this company as well?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you offer such things to the others in this company as well?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I find the very notion rather absurd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I find the very notion rather absurd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I find the very notion rather absurd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tell me, what meaning does this foolish little company charade hold for you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Tell me, what meaning does this foolish little company charade hold for you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Tell me, what meaning does this foolish little company charade hold for you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Others may not, but I know your Shadow well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Others may not, but I know your Shadow well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Others may not, but I know your Shadow well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After repeating so many worlds, it must be simple for you to charm a human's heart.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After repeating so many worlds, it must be simple for you to charm a human's heart.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After repeating so many worlds, it must be simple for you to charm a human's heart.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Family, friends, comrades, lovers, justice, honor, pleasure, admiration, fellowship, responsibility, loyalty...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Family, friends, comrades, lovers, justice, honor, pleasure, admiration, fellowship, responsibility, loyalty...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Family, friends, comrades, lovers, justice, honor, pleasure, admiration, fellowship, responsibility, loyalty...

records.m_Talk_ENG: In the name of saving the world, you took what they could never abandon and turned it into a hostage for sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In the name of saving the world, you took what they could never abandon and turned it into a hostage for sacrifice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In the name of saving the world, you took what they could never abandon and turned it into a hostage for sacrifice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That was the very method our world's Institution once pursued.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That was the very method our world's Institution once pursued.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That was the very method our world's Institution once pursued.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was also how the sage behind the Institution sought to save the world.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was also how the sage behind the Institution sought to save the world.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was also how the sage behind the Institution sought to save the world.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Am I wrong, Old Voice?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Am I wrong, Old Voice?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Am I wrong, Old Voice?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The people of the Institution revered your prophecies as if they were some grand legend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The people of the Institution revered your prophecies as if they were some grand legend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The people of the Institution revered your prophecies as if they were some grand legend.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But at the end of that legend, there was me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But at the end of that legend, there was me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But at the end of that legend, there was me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, who could save no one and nothing, was left with nothing but despair...
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, who could save no one and nothing, was left with nothing but despair...
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, who could save no one and nothing, was left with nothing but despair...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, who failed my loyalty to the very end, survived alone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, who failed my loyalty to the very end, survived alone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, who failed my loyalty to the very end, survived alone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And only now, through Mother's blessing and my reclaimed body...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And only now, through Mother's blessing and my reclaimed body...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And only now, through Mother's blessing and my reclaimed body...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I, the Fallen Knight, can finally stand before you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I, the Fallen Knight, can finally stand before you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I, the Fallen Knight, can finally stand before you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then answer me, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then answer me, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then answer me, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What is your true purpose? Why do you continue this meaningless repetition?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What is your true purpose? Why do you continue this meaningless repetition?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What is your true purpose? Why do you continue this meaningless repetition?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of all beings, you must know best that every ending leads only to despair!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of all beings, you must know best that every ending leads only to despair!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of all beings, you must know best that every ending leads only to despair!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract? Don't make me laugh!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract? Don't make me laugh!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract? Don't make me laugh!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll only beguile more humans with sweet lies and drag those beside you back into the depths of despair!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll only beguile more humans with sweet lies and drag those beside you back into the depths of despair!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll only beguile more humans with sweet lies and drag those beside you back into the depths of despair!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And yet... after all that, what is it that you truly desire...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And yet... after all that, what is it that you truly desire...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And yet... after all that, what is it that you truly desire...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Answer me, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Answer me, Old Voice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Answer me, Old Voice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you will not answer, I'll end you here and sever these chains of despair myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you will not answer, I'll end you here and sever these chains of despair myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you will not answer, I'll end you here and sever these chains of despair myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then and now, all I wish for is world peace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then and now, all I wish for is world peace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then and now, all I wish for is world peace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: World peace, you say?
records.m_Talk_DEU: World peace, you say?
records.m_Talk_FRA: World peace, you say?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You still haven't given up...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You still haven't given up...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You still haven't given up...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: After witnessing the collapse of countless worlds... and the final moments of so many lives...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After witnessing the collapse of countless worlds... and the final moments of so many lives...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After witnessing the collapse of countless worlds... and the final moments of so many lives...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You shamelessly answer that you still haven't given up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You shamelessly answer that you still haven't given up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You shamelessly answer that you still haven't given up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Haha. You're insane.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Haha. You're insane.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Haha. You're insane.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Old Voice, you know it yourself. You've lost your mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Old Voice, you know it yourself. You've lost your mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Old Voice, you know it yourself. You've lost your mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You went mad long ago, just like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You went mad long ago, just like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You went mad long ago, just like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, you've caught my interest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, you've caught my interest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, you've caught my interest.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
So for a while, I
8kll go along with your company charade.

So for a while, I
8kll go along with your company charade.
